items.title: Arch Capital Q3 Earnings Beat, Revenues Miss Estimates
items.description: Arch Capital's strong underwriting and investment gains drive Q3 earnings beat, even as revenues narrowly miss estimates.

items.title: Cincinnati Financial Q3 Earnings and Revenues Top, Premiums Rise Y/Y
items.description: Cincinnati Financial's Q3 profit doubles as strong premium growth, pricing gains and higher investment income lift results.

items.title: Brown & Brown Q3 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Dividend Raised
items.description: BRO's Q3 results reflect increased organic revenues, higher commission and fees, and expanded EBITDAC margin, offset by higher expenses.

items.title: Principal Financial Q3 Earnings & Revenues Lag Estimates, Dividend Up
items.description: PFG's Q3 results reflect solid performance across most of the segments, offset by higher expenses.

items.title: How drivers over 55 can save more than $300 a year on car insurance
items.description: A defensive driving course can save older drivers up to 15% on their premiums
